title: Notes on the Analytical Engine
body: The engine can do whatever we know how to order it to perform.

title: Compilers are just translators
body: A compiler turns human-readable code into machine instructions.

title: Loops and the imagination
body: Iteration lets a small description stand for a large computation.

title: Checking the math by hand
body: Trust, but verify every trajectory calculation.

title: Simplicity is a prerequisite for reliability
body: Elegant code is easier to reason about and to trust.
